name: bridg3alot ver. 1.0.2
description: Standalone cross-platform chat bridge for Twitch, TikTok, YouTube and Kick. Split out from botalot without changing bridge behavior.
description_de: Eigenständige plattformübergreifende Chatbrücke für Twitch, TikTok, YouTube und Kick.
description_en: Standalone cross-platform chat bridge for Twitch, TikTok, YouTube and Kick.
